title: A puppy in need of love and care
description: GEORGE NEWS - Olie is a sweet 10-week-old...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Olie is a sweet 10-week-old puppy who was recently surrendered to the Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA), and he is in urgent need of help.


> Olie is battling mange, a painful and uncomfortable skin condition, and requires immediate treatment to get back to being a healthy and happy pup.


Despite his tough start in life, Olie remains full of love and hope. Now, the GRSPCA is calling on the kindness of our community to help Olie on his journey to recovery. "We’re seeking a generous sponsor to cover the costs of his medical treatment. Every contribution, no matter how small, can make a world of difference for this little fighter," said the GRSPCA's Sam Trietsch.

If you’re able to help Olie, please reach out to them and reference 22G when making your donation. Let’s work together to ensure Olie gets the care he deserves and the chance to grow up happy and healthy.You can contact the GRSPCA on 044 878 1990 or [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
